question: Should optional CLASSIFY suggestions run automatically after canonical commit or only through an explicit later command?
context: Classification is post-commit and must never block a financially valid import; discovery only needs to define the handoff and invocation timing.
decision: Classification is never an INGEST side effect. After successful canonical commit, the Personal Finance Owner or AI Agent Host may invoke CLASSIFY explicitly as a separate command using canonical transaction references; CLASSIFY unavailability cannot change import success.
